title: Location definition
description: A dockable/landable place: station, planet, moon, outpost. Defines what the landed mode offers there, who is present, and how it participates in the economy. GAME-DESIGN.md §2 (Landed) and §3 (economy).

services.description: What the landed mode offers here. Vocabulary is framework-level; the engine renders a service generically, content decides who has it.

npcs_present.description: Souls stationed here (spawned in landed mode when the player visits).

biome.description: Planet surface biome: ground color, sky color, accent, terrain type, optional horizon effect (ruins). Read by PlanetScene. Only meaningful when kind is 'planet'.

horizon.description: Skyline effect: 'ruins' draws a Predecessor ruin silhouette.

points_of_interest.description: Surface POIs for PlanetScene. Each poi has an id, name, kind, and normalized position [0..1, 0..1]. Optional npc id for characters stationed there. Read by PlanetScene.

npc.description: NPC soul id stationed at this POI.

dock.description: Station dock configuration. Sets NPC positions within the docking bay and visual styling. Read by StationDock.

npc_positions.description: NPC soul id -> [x, y] normalized position within the docking bay.

style.description: Visual style override for the docking bay (e.g. 'frontier', 'corp', 'mining').

mining.description: What the drift around this location yields to a mining laser. Absent = nothing minable nearby.

richness.description: Yield rate scalar; 1 = a full unit per mining cycle.

extra.description: Free-form escape hatch for mod-specific data. Never read by the engine.
